title: 8ight Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Transfer of funds from compromised validator addresses to Tornado Cash

prevention.rule: Block any tx sending funds to Tornado Cash from known compromised validator addresses

red_flags: Transfer of large amounts of DAI from compromised validator addresses
Posting of private keys on social media
monitoring_rules: Block any tx sending funds to Tornado Cash from known compromised validator addresses
summary: 8ight Finance lost $1.75 million due to compromised validator keys being used to transfer funds to Tornado Cash. A guard could have detected and blocked the transaction by monitoring for transfers from known compromised validator addresses to Tornado Cash.
